title: Five-Phrase Sober Toolkit for Weddings
description: A short, practical Reel that arms sober-curious folks with five specific phrases for declining drinks at weddings (the highest-pressure social environment in the alcohol calendar). Lead with the phrase that works for the toast. No moralising; no shaming. Spin off three follow-up posts: birthdays, brunches, work events.
hook: Five things to say at the wedding bar without making it weird.

cta.text: Save for the next wedding on your calendar

keyMessage: You don't need a story; you need a sentence. We've got five.
angle: Practicality over philosophy — the playbook, not the argument.
